How It Works About
Get a Free Custom Video Breakdown

For Contractors, HVAC, Plumbing & Home Services

The Call You Missed While on a Job Just Went to Your Competitor.

You cannot be on the phone and on a job at the same time. But the customer who got your voicemail did not wait. They called the next number on Google. A system that texts them back in under 60 seconds holds that lead until you can call back.

Get a Free Custom Video Breakdown

Where the Jobs Are Slipping Through

These are the gaps that cost local businesses work every week. Most owners know something is off. They just have not had the time to fix it.

1

Missed Calls While Your Hands Are Full

When you are under a sink, up on a roof, or running a crew, you cannot answer every call. That is just the job. But if a missed call gets a text back in under 60 seconds, most customers will wait. They know someone is there. Without that text, most of them call the next number and book whoever answers.

2

Leads That Go Cold in Hours, Not Days

Home service leads move fast. Someone's water heater is out or their AC stops working in July. They are calling multiple shops at once. You get back to them two hours later and the job is already booked. The window is short. A system that fires an immediate text response keeps you in the conversation until you can make the call.

3

Estimates That Sit With No Follow-Up

You did the estimate. They said they would think about it. You have not heard back in a week. Most owners follow up once, maybe twice, then move on. But most people are just busy, not uninterested. A structured follow-up sequence over 10 to 14 days, a few short messages, converts a meaningful share of those dead estimates into booked jobs.

4

Almost No System for Google Reviews

Most contractors do quality work and have almost nothing to show for it on Google. The shops with 150 reviews are not necessarily better. They just have a system that asks. An automatic review request that goes out after every completed job builds your Google profile over time. More reviews means more calls from search without spending on ads.

Three Things Running Automatically While You Are on Jobs

The Client Capture Engine handles missed calls, lead follow-up, and review generation without adding anything to your plate. Missed calls get a text back in under 60 seconds. New leads and estimates trigger a follow-up sequence automatically. Completed jobs get a review request. All three run in the background while you do the work.

1

Missed Call Text-Back

Any call you cannot answer gets an automatic text back in under 60 seconds. The conversation starts before they find the next number to call.

2

Lead & Quote Follow-Up

New leads and sent quotes trigger an automatic follow-up sequence over 10 to 14 days. You never manually chase a lead again.

3

Review Generation

After a job is complete, an automatic review request goes out by text. More 5-star reviews without asking your staff to remember to do it.

Nothing in Your Current Setup Changes

We do not touch your scheduling app, your invoicing system, or any tool you currently use. Whatever you are running stays exactly as it is. We sit in front of those systems and handle only the incoming lead stage and post-job follow-up.

Want to See How Many Jobs You Are Losing to Slow Response?

Get a free custom video breakdown. I will look at your current setup and show you exactly where leads are falling through before you ever get a chance to quote them.
